nasb.text: So they said, “An Egyptian delivered us from the hand of the shepherds, and what is more, he even drew the water for us and watered the flock.”

esv.text: They said, “An Egyptian delivered us out of the hand of the shepherds and even drew water for us and watered the flock.”

cnv.text: 她們說：“有一個埃及人救我們脫離了牧羊人的手，而且還為我們打水給羊群喝。”

ccb.text: 她们答道：“有一个埃及人救我们免遭牧人的欺负，还帮我们打水饮羊群。”
